function.name: _save_dashboard_number_card
function.description:
Create or edit a statistical number card in the dashboard. Only cards of type 'Number' can be created or modified. Statistical number cards are used to display a single aggregated indicator value, supporting configuration of data sources, filter conditions, aggregation functions, and number styles (color, font size, format, unit, precision, description text).

Special Notes:
1. Aggregation Rules: When aggregation=true, aggregationQueryList must be provided; the fieldId in aggregationQueryList cannot be 'id' or 'seq' fields, and must use business fields.
2. Filter Condition Rules: The fieldId in the conditionList of 'filter' must be a real existing field ID in the data table and cannot be made up.
3. Color Rules (Strictly Obey): All color fields can only use standard 6-digit HEX format strings (e.g., '#5B8FF9') or system theme color variables (e.g., 'c1'~'c10'); it is strictly prohibited to use formats such as rgba(...), rgb(...), hsl(...); it is strictly prohibited to use functions or dynamic expressions; pure black #000000 shall not be used.
4. The finally generated content needs to be JSON parsed, so it must comply with JSON specifications and no functions are allowed.

id.description: Card ID. Do not pass when creating, must pass when editing.

name.description: Card name, displayed in the dashboard card title area.

scope.description: The ID of the dashboard to which the card belongs.

width.description: Card width, calculated by the number of grids occupied, maximum 24.

height.description: Card height, calculated by the number of grids occupied.

isInTab.description: Whether to display in the Tab page.

refreshTime.description: Automatic refresh interval (seconds), takes effect when enableRefresh=true, default 30.

mobileDisplayHeightVar.description: Card height expression when displayed on mobile (optional).

disableToolbar.description: Whether to disable the card toolbar.

enableCardStyle.description: Whether to enable the custom styles in cardStyle.

enableButton.description: Whether to enable card extension buttons.

cardStyle.description: Card appearance style, controlling background, padding, border, title font, etc.

titleFontSize.description: Title font size, CSS string, default '13px'.

titleColor.description: Title color. Can only be chosen from: #5B8FF9, #57CA8C, #5D7092, #FAAD14, #E86452, #56C1EC, #945FB9, #FF9845, #1E9493. Can be empty.

titlePosition.description: Title horizontal alignment position, can be filled with: left, center, right, default left.

subTitleColor.description: Subtitle color. Can only be chosen from: #5B8FF9, #57CA8C, #5D7092, #FAAD14, #E86452, #56C1EC, #945FB9, #FF9845, #1E9493.

bgType.description: Background type, can be filled with: image, color, transparent, default image.

bgColor.description: Background color (effective when bgType='color'). Can only be chosen from: #5B8FF9, #57CA8C, #5D7092, #FAAD14, #E86452, #56C1EC, #945FB9, #FF9845, #1E9493.

bgImageId.description: Background image ID (can be filled when bgType='image').

bgImageSize.description: Background image size, corresponding to CSS background-size, e.g., 'cover', 'contain'.

padding.description: Unified padding around (pixels), effective when paddingControl=false, default 10.

paddingControl.description: Whether to enable fine padding control (set top, bottom, left, right separately).

overflow.description: Overflow strategy, can be filled with: auto, hidden, visible.

borderColor.description: Border color. Can only be chosen from: #5B8FF9, #57CA8C, #5D7092, #FAAD14, #E86452, #56C1EC, #945FB9, #FF9845, #1E9493.

enableBorderImage.description: Whether to enable border background image, borderImage* fields are used only when true.

borderImageId.description: Border background image ID (used when enableBorderImage=true).

borderImageIsFill.description: Whether the border background image fills the center slice area.

borderImageSlice.description: Border image slice configuration (according to CSS border-image-slice).

borderImageTopOutset.description: Top border image outset size, default 0.

borderImageRightOutset.description: Right border image outset size, default 0.

borderImageBottomOutset.description: Bottom border image outset size, default 0.

borderImageLeftOutset.description: Left border image outset size, default 0.

borderImageRepeatX.description: Border image horizontal filling method, can be filled with: round, repeat, stretch, default round.

borderImageRepeatY.description: Border image vertical filling method, can be filled with: round, repeat, stretch, default round.

buttonList.description: Array of card extension button configurations. Takes effect when enableButton=true, pass an empty array when not needed.

buttonStyle.description: Layout style of card extension buttons.

size.description: Button size, can be filled with: small, medium, large, default small.

orient.description: Arrangement direction, can be filled with: horizontal, vertical, default horizontal.

horizontal.description: Horizontal alignment, can be filled with: left, center, right, default right.

vertical.description: Vertical alignment, can be filled with: top, middle, bottom, default top.

numberSetting.description: Core data and display configuration of the statistical number card.

tableId.description: Data source table ID, must be a real existing table ID in the system.

aggregation.description: Whether to enable aggregation calculation. Usually set to true to perform statistical summary on data, default true.

aggregationQueryList.description: Aggregation calculation configuration list, required when aggregation=true. Each item in the array defines an aggregation indicator, and the card displays the result of the first indicator.

fieldId.description: The ID of the field to be aggregated. 'id' or 'seq' fields shall not be used, and business fields must be used.

func.description: Aggregation function, can be filled with: count (count), avg (average), sum (sum), max (maximum), min (minimum). Note: avg, sum, max, min require the field to be a numeric type.

distinct.description: Whether to perform deduplication statistics, default false.

aggregationSplitMultiValue.description: Whether to split multi-value fields before aggregation, default false.

opt.description: Root condition combination logic, can be filled with: and (AND), or (OR).

conditionList.description: Filter condition list (Condition object array), must not contain FilterCondition objects.

fieldId.description: Filter field ID, must be a real existing field ID in the data table. The special value '$expression' indicates using a custom expression.

opt.description: Comparison operator, can be filled with: eq (equal to), ne (not equal to), gt (greater than), ge (greater than or equal to), lt (less than), le (less than or equal to), contains (contains), notcontains (does not contain), startswith (starts with), endswith (ends with), isnull (not set), isnotnull (set), in (in list), notin (not in list).

value.description: Filter value. Required when opt is not isnull and not isnotnull. For single-value conditions, fill in the value directly; for multi-value conditions (such as in/notin), use an array; values of enumeration fields are placed in an array. Boolean or numeric types are wrapped with ${}, e.g., ${true}, ${100}.

func.description: Field processing function (optional). Can be filled with: day, month, week, quarter, year, hour, minute, second, length, nlevel, dayofyear, dayofmonth, weekofyear, daytonow, weektonow, monthtonow, quartertonow, yeartonow, fmtday, fmtweek, fmtmonth, fmtquarter, fmtyear, nameOfAccount.

var.description: Mark whether the value is a variable expression, default false.

formula.description: Whether to use formula functions, default false.

ignoreNull.description: Whether to ignore null values, default false.

children.description: Nested child filter condition group (FilterCondition object array), for complex condition combinations.

opt.description: Child group condition combination logic, can be filled with: and, or.

conditionList.description: Child group filter condition list (Condition object array).

groupByFieldList.description: Group field ID list (tableFieldId). Statistical number cards are usually not grouped, pass an empty array.

orderByList.description: Sort configuration list, pass an empty array when not needed.

type.description: Sort method, can be filled with: asc (ascending), desc (descending).

xPosition.description: Horizontal alignment of the number in the card, can be filled with: left, center, right, default center.

yPosition.description: Vertical alignment of the number in the card, can be filled with: top, center, bottom, default center.

placeholderColor.description: Color of the prompt text when there is no data. Can only be chosen from: #5B8FF9, #57CA8C, #5D7092, #FAAD14, #E86452, #56C1EC, #945FB9, #FF9845, #1E9493.

title.description: Description text (label) below the number, e.g., 'Total', 'Number of Sick Leave', default 'Description'.

titleColor.description: Description text color. Can only be chosen from: #5B8FF9, #57CA8C, #5D7092, #FAAD14, #E86452, #56C1EC, #945FB9, #FF9845, #1E9493.

count.description: Upper limit of the number of queried data items, usually keep the default value 1000.

unit.description: Numeric unit, displayed to the right of the number, e.g., 'piece', 'yuan', 'time', default 'piece'.

color.description: Main color of the number. Can only be chosen from: #5B8FF9, #57CA8C, #5D7092, #FAAD14, #E86452, #56C1EC, #945FB9, #FF9845, #1E9493.

format.description: Number display format, can be filled with: number (ordinary number), comma (thousandth separator, e.g., 1,234,567), default number.

precision.description: Number of decimal places, range 0~5, 0 means display integer, default 0.
